evals.name: onboarding-survey-spanish
evals.prompt: Necesito una encuesta de onboarding para nuevos miembros del equipo de AI. 8 preguntas mix de multi-choice, scale, paragraph. Quiero incluir una tabla comparativa de las 4 herramientas AI principales (Claude / ChatGPT / Copilot / Gemini) con sus diferencias, y un video corto de bienvenida del CEO (YouTube URL: https://www.youtube.com/watch?v=dQw4w9WgXcQ). Dashboard con NPS de la experiencia de onboarding. Recibir respuestas en una Google Sheet. Idioma: español.
evals.expected_output: Complete Apps Script (.gs file) that creates a Google Form with: 8 questions across 3 sections, 1 YouTube video item, 1 image item (referencing a generated PNG for the comparison table), Spanish helper text and titles, custom-slugged headers (timestamp, nombre, fecha_inicio, rol, herramienta_anterior, años_experiencia_ai, proyectos_relevantes, nps_onboarding, comentarios_extra), Dashboard tab config with NPS calculation + donut for rol + bar for años_experiencia + timeseries. Includes PNG generation spec for the comparison table (separate from the .gs file).

assertions.text: Output contains a complete .gs file (starts with 'function main()' or 'const CONFIG' and ends cleanly)
Apps Script includes FormApp.create() with Spanish title
Apps Script has at least 3 addPageBreakItem() calls (3 sections)
Apps Script has at least 8 question items (counting addTextItem, addParagraphTextItem, addMultipleChoiceItem, addListItem, addScaleItem, addCheckboxItem, addDateItem, etc.)
Apps Script has addVideoItem() with the YouTube URL
Apps Script has addImageItem() referencing CONFIG.IMAGE_IDS
Apps Script has setDestination(FormApp.DestinationType.SPREADSHEET, ...) call
Apps Script defines CONFIG.customHeaders with at least 9 entries (timestamp + 8 questions)
Custom headers use snake_case (no spaces, no question marks, no special chars except _ and accented chars)
Custom headers include 'nps_onboarding' or similar NPS-related slug
Apps Script includes setupDashboard() function with at least an NPS calculation
Spec for PNG generation (comparison table) is provided separately as JSON or Python script invocation
Helper text on questions is in Spanish, conversational, under 200 chars each

evals.name: customer-feedback-nps-with-webhook
evals.prompt: Encuesta de satisfacción post-compra. 5 preguntas: nombre (opcional), email con validación, dropdown de categoría de producto (al menos 5 categorías), NPS 0-10, y comentarios libres. Quiero un webhook que postee a https://api.misitio.com/feedback en cada respuesta. Email de alerta solo cuando NPS < 6 a admin@misitio.com. Dashboard con NPS y distribución por categoría. Idioma: español.
evals.expected_output: Apps Script with form + linked sheet + conditional email logic (only sends email when nps < 6) + webhook on every submit + custom dashboard with NPS calculation + donut by category.

assertions.text: Output is a complete .gs Apps Script file
Apps Script has exactly 5 question items
Email field has setValidation with email regex pattern
Dropdown for category has setChoiceValues with at least 5 entries
Scale item for NPS uses setBounds(0, 10)
CONFIG includes enableWebhook: true and webhookUrl: 'https://api.misitio.com/feedback'
CONFIG includes enableEmailNotify: true and emailNotifyTo: 'admin@misitio.com'
onFormSubmitHandler has conditional logic that only sends email when nps < 6
Webhook is sent on every submit (no NPS condition for webhook)
Dashboard config includes 'nps' type and 'donut' for categoria_producto

evals.name: employee-engagement-survey-with-grid-and-file-upload
evals.prompt: Encuesta de engagement anual. 12 preguntas en 3 secciones. Incluye una matriz (grid) donde el empleado ranka 5 dimensiones de su trabajo (Autonomía, Crecimiento, Equipo, Liderazgo, Impacto) en escala de 1 a 5. También un file upload opcional para 'comentarios privados al CEO' (solo PDF, max 10MB, max 1 archivo). Necesito una lista visual (PNG) explicando qué significa cada dimensión antes de la matriz. Dashboard sin webhook. Idioma: español. Notar al usuario que file upload requires Google Workspace.
evals.expected_output: Apps Script with 3 sections, 12 questions including addGridItem for the 5×5 matrix, addFileUploadItem with PDF-only / 10MB / 1 file restrictions, image item before the grid referencing a PNG showing the 5 dimensions with descriptions, custom dashboard config. Warning message about Workspace requirement.

assertions.text: Output is a complete .gs Apps Script file
Apps Script has 3 addPageBreakItem() calls
Apps Script has addGridItem with setRows containing the 5 dimensions
Grid item has setColumns with 5 rating options
Apps Script has addFileUploadItem with setMaxFileSize(10) and setMaxNumberOfFiles(1)
File upload item has setAllowedFileTypes including FormApp.FileType.PDF
Apps Script has addImageItem before the grid item
PNG spec for the dimensions list is provided (list type with 5 items, each with title + description)
Output includes a warning to the user about file upload requiring Google Workspace
CONFIG has enableWebhook: false (not enabled)
Apps Script has approximately 12 question items total
